name: microsoft/phi-2
_note: 2.7B reasoning powerhouse. NF4 fits ~1.5GB. Strongest Q2 teacher.

name: Qwen/Qwen3-4B-Base
_note: 4B decoder. NF4 fits ~2GB. Very strong representations.

name: google/gemma-3-1b-pt
_note: 1B decoder. Strong geometry. Auto-quantizes to NF4 if needed.

name: google-bert/bert-base-uncased
_note: 110M encoder. Bidirectional attention = unique CKA geometry.

name: nomic-ai/nomic-embed-text-v1.5
_note: Matryoshka embeddings encoder. Unique multi-scale geometry.

name: gpt2
_note: 124M decoder. Weak but architecturally familiar. Regularizer.

name: BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5
_note: 33M encoder. Strong sentence embeddings for size.
